atomic_facts.fact: Hands are holding a ball joint that has been cut in half to show the interior.
The text 'How to replace a ball joint' is displayed at the top left.
The text 'Ball joint cut-away' is displayed in the center.
The text 'How to tell if your tie rod is bad' is displayed at the bottom left.
A close-up shot shows a ball joint covered in green grease.

The text 'How to tell if your tie rod is bad' is below the hands and to the left of the greasy joint.

atomic_facts.fact: The video frame displays a collage of four distinct images related to car maintenance.
A pair of hands is holding a cut-away model of a ball joint to show its internal structure.
The text 'How to replace a ball joint' is positioned above an arrow pointing to a suspension assembly.
The text 'Ball joint cut-away' is positioned next to an arrow pointing to the hands holding the component.
The text 'How to tell if your tie rod is bad' is positioned above an arrow pointing to a close-up of a joint boot.
